transition.intent: Move to template-maintenance only after the public-safe Job DSL gate remains green and the Job DSL, Pipeline DSL, service catalog, and controller/JCasC boundaries are documented.
transition.decision_rule: All required gates must be passed, machine-checkable, or waived before changing current_phase.

phase_model.purpose: Stabilize public-safe Job DSL generation and service pipeline catalog validation.
Document Job DSL, Pipeline DSL, and JCasC boundaries plus controller-free regression strategy.
blocked_work: controller-dependent validation requirements for public defaults

phase_model.purpose: Maintain the public Jenkins template after readiness gates are complete.
blocked_work: new Jenkins platform scope without an explicit phase

required_gates.description: The repository-owned controller-free wrapper must pass before template-maintenance handoff.
Job DSL, Pipeline DSL, service catalog, and controller/JCasC ownership boundaries are documented for public-safe users.
The controller-free pipeline unit and regression fixture strategy is documented without requiring a live Jenkins controller.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in pipeline-boundary-hardening and keep live-controller checks separate from public defaults.

required_gates.description: The dev, staging, and prod public preset matrix is documented with validation commands and expected public-safe service job behavior.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in pipeline-boundary-hardening and align the preset matrix docs before template-maintenance handoff.

required_gates.description: The passed job-dsl-coverage gate evidence is recorded before moving boundary hardening forward.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in pipeline-boundary-hardening until the latest controller-free validation evidence is recorded.
